vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection - Login Bypass (admin@juice-sh.op)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use parameterized queries. Never concatenate user input into SQL.

vulnerabilities.title: Mass Assignment - Admin Role via Registration
vulnerabilities.evidence: Registered user with admin role: bp-test-1773290826@test.local
vulnerabilities.remediation: Whitelist allowed fields on user creation. Never trust role from client.
vulnerabilities.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

vulnerabilities.title: JWT None Algorithm Attack (alg=None)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Reject tokens with alg=none. Use RS256 with key verification.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection - Search UNION (union-extract-users)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Parameterize search queries. Use an ORM with query builder.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection - Search UNION (union-users)
vulnerabilities.payload: qwert')) UNION SELECT id,email,password,'4','5','6','7','8','9' FROM Users--
vulnerabilities.remediation: Parameterize search queries. Use an ORM with query builder.

vulnerabilities.title: Admin Panel Access
vulnerabilities.evidence: Full admin panel accessible with compromised credentials
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement MFA. Use role-based access control with proper session management.

vulnerabilities.title: Default Credentials - admin@juice-sh.op (admin)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Enforce strong password policy. Change default credentials.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection - Error Based (Search)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Suppress database error messages. Use parameterized queries.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection - Error Based (Search)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Suppress database error messages. Use parameterized queries.

vulnerabilities.title: JWT Key Exposure: /encryptionkeys/jwt.pub
vulnerabilities.remediation: Never expose private keys or JWT secrets via HTTP.

vulnerabilities.title: JWT Key Exposure: /.well-known/jwks.json
vulnerabilities.remediation: Never expose private keys or JWT secrets via HTTP.

vulnerabilities.title: SSRF via Profile Image URL
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate and restrict URLs. Block internal/private IP ranges.

vulnerabilities.title: IDOR - Access Basket #1 (3 items)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Accessed another user's basket with 3 items
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify basket ownership server-side. Compare basket owner with JWT subject.

vulnerabilities.title: IDOR - Access Basket #2 (1 items)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Accessed another user's basket with 1 items
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify basket ownership server-side. Compare basket owner with JWT subject.

vulnerabilities.title: IDOR - Access Basket #3 (1 items)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Accessed another user's basket with 1 items
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify basket ownership server-side. Compare basket owner with JWT subject.

vulnerabilities.title: IDOR - Access Basket #4 (1 items)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Accessed another user's basket with 1 items
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify basket ownership server-side. Compare basket owner with JWT subject.

vulnerabilities.title: IDOR - Access Basket #5 (2 items)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Accessed another user's basket with 2 items
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify basket ownership server-side. Compare basket owner with JWT subject.

vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper authorization checks on user endpoints.

vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper authorization checks on user endpoints.

vulnerabilities.title: FTP Directory Listing (27+ files)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Directory listing with sensitive files exposed
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable directory listings. Restrict access to FTP-served content.

vulnerabilities.title: Open API - Challenge list (meta-data) (111 records, no auth)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Require authentication for /api/Challenges. Implement RBAC.

vulnerabilities.title: Open API - All feedback (8 records, no auth)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Require authentication for /api/Feedbacks. Implement RBAC.

vulnerabilities.title: Open API - Recycle requests (1 records, no auth)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Require authentication for /api/Recycles. Implement RBAC.

vulnerabilities.title: Open API - Security questions (14 records, no auth)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Require authentication for /api/SecurityQuestions. Implement RBAC.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Confidential business document
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Legal document
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Metrics/Debug Endpoint Exposed: /metrics
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict metrics endpoints to internal networks only.

vulnerabilities.title: XSS - Potential DOM-based
vulnerabilities.evidence: SPA renders fragment parameters without apparent sanitization
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use DOMPurify to sanitize fragment-based routing parameters.

vulnerabilities.title: XSS - Potential DOM-based
vulnerabilities.evidence: SPA renders fragment parameters without apparent sanitization
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use DOMPurify to sanitize fragment-based routing parameters.

vulnerabilities.title: Error Disclosure - Invalid user ID
vulnerabilities.evidence: Verbose error message / stack trace exposed
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use generic error pages. Never expose stack traces in production.

vulnerabilities.title: CORS Misconfiguration (reflects: https://evil.com)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict CORS to trusted origins. Never reflect arbitrary origins.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Headers (2)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add all recommended security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options.
